headlines.headline: Varvov Retail Group completes strategic acquisition to strengthen data analytics

headlines.headline: Varvov Retail Group sees 5% drop in new customer orders this quarter

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
